/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/profile_ram_zksnark.dir/zk_proof_systems/zksnark/ram_zksnark/profiling/profile_ram_zksnark.cpp.o -o profile_ram_zksnark  libsnarkd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 ../depends/libff/libff/libffd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -lgmp -lgmpxx -lcrypto
